title: Traité élémentaire de chimie, tome 1: Présenté dans un ordre nouveau et d'après les découvertes modernes; avec Figures
summaries: "Traité élémentaire de chimie, tome 1" by Antoine Laurent Lavoisier is a textbook published in 1789. Considered the first modern chemistry textbook, it redefines what an element is and introduces revolutionary concepts like the law of conservation of mass. Lavoisier presents 33 elements, documents chemical reactions including fermentation, and publishes the first chemical equation. This groundbreaking work transforms chemistry from ancient practice into modern science, establishing principles still taught today. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
